description: An inline mark feature for rich text. Marks are inline annotations (bold, italic, code, etc.) that may freely overlap. Expand semantics control mark behavior at cursor boundaries per the Peritext model.

main.description: An inline mark applied to a byte range in the document text.

name.description: The mark type name. Known values are listed above; unknown values are preserved for forward compatibility.

attrs.description: Optional mark-specific attributes (e.g., { uri } for a link mark). Free-form JSON object.

expandStart.description: Whether this mark grows to include text inserted at its start boundary. Peritext expand semantics. If omitted, defaults apply per name: bold/italic/strikethrough/underline default to true; code/keyboard/superscript/subscript default to false.

expandEnd.description: Whether this mark grows to include text inserted at its end boundary. If omitted, defaults apply per name (same as expandStart).
